name: hotel managers processing 10–20 bookings/month tool
description: For hotel managers processing 10–20 bookings/month, manual data entry causes delayed revenue insights. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet calculations.
problem_solved: Inability to quickly generate accurate revenue and occupancy reports from sales data.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to quickly generate accurate revenue and occupancy reports from sales data.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For hotel managers processing 10–20 bookings/month, manual data entry causes delayed revenue insights. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet calculations.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual data entry and spreadsheet calculations

one_liner: For hotel managers processing 10–20 bookings/month, manual data entry causes delayed revenue insights. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet calculations.
